<SYSTEM>This is the developer documentation for Dioxus from /learn/0.7/essentials/basics/.</SYSTEM>
# Reactivity

* the act of handling user input and updating state is called reactivity
* when the state changes, dioxus re-renders your component

## Table of Contents
# Reactivity

* the act of handling user input and updating state is called reactivity
* when the state changes, dioxus re-renders your component
